'''Thuugar''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] "leg-breaker" who was once hired on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]] by a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who owned a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. The price for his services was 50 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per day.
